breaking_news_suggestions.headline: Dome Author's Own Files Expose OTS Claim: 'Prospective' Prediction Registered at Window's Close
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: WIN-037 (SAA decay rate) was registered on 6 March 2026 — the final week of the claimed March 2025–March 2026 measurement window. By registration, ~99% of the decay had already occurred. We had previously credited this as 'the closest any dome prediction comes to genuine temporal priority,' based on a wrong date we introduced ourselves. The correction reverses that concession entirely: WIN-037 is retrodiction, not prediction.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: A critical self-introduced error that hands the dome author a legitimate grievance. Now fixed. The reversal from concession to retrodiction is the more accurate position and more damaging to the dome.
